fields.label: Why do you want to work at Synthesia?
fields.value:
I'm excited about the opportunity to work at Synthesia because I'm drawn to organizations that operate at scale, solve complex technical challenges, and prioritize innovation and long-term impact. Throughout my experience at Microsoft and Amazon Robotics, I've enjoyed working at the intersection of technology, operations, and strategy — leading cross-functional initiatives, building scalable systems, and driving measurable business outcomes.

What particularly interests me about Synthesia is the opportunity to contribute to high-impact products and programs while collaborating with talented teams across engineering, product, and business functions. I'm especially motivated by environments where I can combine technical depth with program leadership to improve reliability, automation, and operational efficiency.

In my current role, I've led large-scale resilience and automation initiatives, developed AI-driven workflow solutions, and managed complex cross-organizational programs under executive visibility. I enjoy taking ambiguous problems, creating structure, and driving execution from concept through delivery. I'd be excited to bring that same mindset to Synthesia while continuing to grow in a fast-paced and innovative environment.

Beyond the technical challenges, I'm also looking for a company whose culture emphasizes ownership, collaboration, and continuous improvement. From what I've seen, Synthesia aligns strongly with those values, which makes the opportunity especially compelling to me.

fields.label: Do you have experience with APIs, and strong ability to read and write code?
fields.value: Yes. I have hands-on experience in this area through my work at Microsoft on the Resilience Automation Platform and earlier roles in customer-facing engineering.

fields.label: Which SaaS startups have you worked with in the past to optimize their product utilization?
fields.value: Yes. I have hands-on experience in this area through my work at Microsoft on the Resilience Automation Platform and earlier roles in customer-facing engineering.

fields.label: Please confirm you have seen the salary range in the JD
fields.source: comp_seeking: standard range for PM/TPM/SE roles

fields.label: Are you legally authorised to work in the country you wish to work in without the need for visa sponsorship?
Where are you currently based? This role is based in NYC or Austin. If you are not currently located in one of these cities, would you be open to relocating?
fields.source: ashby_location_ack (US onsite/relocation never a knockout -> Yes)
